response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and a diverse technical background, including experience with distributed systems and telemetry at scale (e.g., Dunnhumby media). However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or AI-driven growth systems. While he demonstrates leadership in other areas (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, DevOps), the alignment with the Principal Software Engineer role focused on growth/experimentation is partial.
strengths: Proven track record in building scalable systems with low-latency requirements and distributed architectures
Strong hands-on coding skills across multiple languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, Python) and frameworks
Demonstrated technical leadership in architecture, mentorship, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear experience with experimentation or feature-flagging systems (core to the role)
Limited evidence of statistical experimentation or A/B testing at enterprise scale
Lack of direct experience with growth-oriented systems or cross-team experimentation frameworks
